summary: Session 15+16 testing complete. ALL FEATURES PASSED: (1) Jest suite 130/130 tests passing (+10 stripe_wiring, +8 art_direction tests), (2) Stripe opt-in recipes verified: RECIPES.stripe_client and RECIPES.stripe_pricing_3tier exist, recipesForWave correctly swaps pricing_3tier for stripe_pricing_3tier when useStripe=true, (3) Stripe + Supabase coexist in scaffold recipes, (4) Vercel bundler with Stripe: includes @stripe/stripe-js dep, .env.local.example with VITE_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, README mentions Stripe, stripeClient.jsx rewritten to use import.meta.env, (5) BackendConfigModal has new Stripe publishable key field with data-testid='backend-stripe-key', validation rejects keys not starting with pk_test_ or pk_live_, (6) Art-direction analyzer unit tests pass: returns null on no images/empty/provider error, calls provider.chat with vision content, caps at 4 images, (7) Art-direction pipeline wiring verified in message-stream.js (Step 1.5), stream-client.js (onArtDirection callback), stream-handler.js (briefProgressAccumulator.artDirection), (8) BriefProgressCard has art-direction summary section with data-testid='art-direction-summary', (9) Responsive self-review: brief-builder.js has HARD RULE #14 RESPONSIVE BASELINE, brief-reviewer.js has RULE 7 for missing-responsive-classes, (10) Dashboard loads, no console errors, existing Supabase modal behavior works.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Jest suite 130/130 tests passing across 10 test files
PASS: RECIPES.stripe_client exists with file='components/stripeClient.jsx', preview-safe with window.__STRIPE_SDK__
PASS: RECIPES.stripe_pricing_3tier exists with file='pages/Pricing.jsx', falls back to signup when unconfigured

PASS: recipesForWave('public', 'saas_tool', {useStripe: true}) swaps 'pricing_3tier' for 'stripe_pricing_3tier'
PASS: Supabase and Stripe coexist in scaffold recipes (supabase_client + stripe_client)
PASS: planWaves with useStripe=true includes 'components/stripeClient.jsx' in scaffold wave

PASS: .env.local.example contains VITE_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY with actual key value
PASS: README.md includes Stripe section with setup instructions

PASS: Both Supabase and Stripe env vars coexist in .env.local.example
PASS: BackendConfigModal has Stripe publishable key field with data-testid='backend-stripe-key'
PASS: Stripe validation rejects keys not starting with pk_test_ or pk_live_
PASS: analyzeArtDirection returns null on no attachments, no images, no data, provider error, tiny response
PASS: analyzeArtDirection calls provider.chat with vision content when image provided
PASS: analyzeArtDirection caps at 4 images to respect token budget
PASS: message-stream.js has Step 1.5 for art direction analysis before planning
PASS: stream-client.js has 'art_direction' SSE dispatch (line ~97)
PASS: stream-handler.js persists artDirection in briefProgressAccumulator
PASS: BriefProgressCard has art-direction summary section with data-testid='art-direction-summary'
PASS: brief-builder.js has HARD RULE #14 RESPONSIVE BASELINE (line 87)
PASS: brief-reviewer.js has RULE 7 for responsive baseline with missing-responsive-classes flag (line 70)
PASS: Dashboard loads with MyBuildsWidget showing build stats
PASS: No console errors on dashboard
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session 15+16 features complete. Stripe opt-in wiring added: RECIPES.stripe_client and stripe_pricing_3tier, recipesForWave swaps pricing when useStripe=true, Vercel bundler emits Stripe deps and rewrites stripeClient.jsx. BackendConfigModal has new Stripe field with validation. Art-direction analyzer added for GPT-4o Vision reference image analysis - unit tests pass, pipeline wiring in place (Step 1.5 in message-stream.js). BriefProgressCard shows art-direction summary. Responsive self-review rules added to brief-builder.js (HARD RULE #14) and brief-reviewer.js (RULE 7). Jest suite at 130/130 tests.

backend_config_modal.validation_error_message: Stripe key must start with pk_test_ or pk_live_ (never the secret key!)
